MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to August 29, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Continued To Jun-27-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:47:11 a.m. and concluding at 11:25:32 a.m.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc. appearing represented by Eric Jun.
Defendant Dove Trucking Inc. not appearing.

BENJAMIN SEEMAN is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

BENJAMIN SEEMAN is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc., and against Defendant Dove Trucking Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $30,265.28
2. Prejudgment Interest: DENIED
3. Costs: $590.17
4. Attorney Fees: $1,200.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $32,055.45

Counsel to submit Proposed judgment to Court for review and signature. (D505)
